creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2012-02-08 03:57:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-method_source Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  method_source is a utility to return a method's sourcecode as a Ruby string.
  Also returns Proc and Lambda sourcecode.
  
  Author: John Mair http://banisterfiend.wordpress.com/
  WWW:    http://rubygems.org/gems/method_source
  
  PR:             ports/164864
  Submitted by:   Shin-ya MURAKAMI <murashin@gfd-dennou.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4823    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/devel/rubygem-method_source/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-method_source/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-method_source/pkg-descr (new)
